BeTong - ban chay Windows 7

Yeu cau tren may cai dat:
- Windows 7 SP1.
- .NET Framework 4.8 Runtime da duoc cai dat.
- May tinh phai truy cap duoc SQL Server trong file BeTong.exe.config.

Cach dung:
1. Giai nen goi BeTong-win7.zip.
2. Chay Install-BeTong.bat de copy chuong trinh vao %LOCALAPPDATA%\BeTong va tao shortcut ngoai Desktop.
3. Hoac chay truc tiep BeTong.exe trong thu muc nay.

Luu y:
- Khong xoa file BeTong.exe.config vi file nay chua cau hinh ket noi database.
- Neu doi server/database, sua connection string trong BeTong.exe.config.
